race.description: Magic Millions March Yearling Sale Class 1 Plate
race.comment: ANDI DON'T CARE (7) has hit a purple patch this campaign with a win and three placings from four starts and it's hard to knock mares in form. Gets the services of Maloney in the saddle and is sure to run her usual honest race. DISMANTLE (8) strips fitter second-up from the break and gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Should be able to sit up on speed and will give backers a sight. Former NSW galloper IMPACT ZONE (5) is having his first run for the new yard but the form he displayed down south was good enough for a race of this calibre. Respect any market confidence. IMMEDIATE (9) is yet to miss a drum in four starts over this distance range and draws favourably in gate one. Shouldn't be underestimated.
